scripts.setup: git submodule update --init && cd vendor/pocketjs && bun install && cd ../.. && mkdir -p node_modules && ln -sfn ../vendor/pocketjs/node_modules/solid-js node_modules/solid-js && ln -sfn ../vendor/pocketjs/node_modules/@napi-rs node_modules/@napi-rs && ln -sfn ../vendor/pocketjs/node_modules/bun-types node_modules/bun-types && ln -sfn ../vendor/pocketjs/node_modules/typescript node_modules/typescript && ln -sfn ../vendor/pocketjs/node_modules/opentype.js node_modules/opentype.js && mkdir -p node_modules/@types && ln -sfn ../../vendor/pocketjs/node_modules/@types/opentype.js node_modules/@types/opentype.js
